title: Zeison Sha Warrior armor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:ZeisonShaWarriorArmor.jpg|thumb|right|180px|The armor of a Zeison Sha Warrior.]]
'''Zeison Sha Warrior armor''' was a type of [[Armor/Legends|armored]] robe that was only worn by the elite Warriors of the [[Zeison Sha]] from the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Yanibar]]. It was lightweight, did not interfere with its users' [[Telekinesis/Legends|telekinetic]] [[The Force/Legends|Force]] abilities, and was readily customizable.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-12-21 -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]]
